description_id: Bertanggung jawab dalam membangun landing page dan sistem web kustom sesuai permintaan klien menggunakan stack Laravel dan Tailwind CSS.
description_en: Responsible for building landing pages and custom web systems according to client requests using Laravel and Tailwind CSS stack.

company: RS Bakti Timah Medika Pangkal Pinang
description_id: Membantu pengembangan sistem internal rumah sakit, mengoptimalkan database, dan memastikan antarmuka pengguna responsif dan mudah digunakan oleh staf medis.
description_en: Assisting in the development of internal hospital systems, optimizing databases, and ensuring the user interface is responsive and easy to use by medical staff.
